---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Southampton Solent University · Exercise Science
:::

# Velu Immonen.

::: {.tagline}
PhD student researching the relationship between muscle size and strength.
Based in Southampton.
:::

::: {.home-ctas}
[Selected Works](works.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Blog](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
[GitHub](https://github.com/veluimmonen){.btn .btn-outline}
:::
:::

::: {.home-section}
::: {.section-label}
Recent writing
:::

```{=html}
<div class="recent-posts-list">
  <!-- Quarto listing will populate this via blog.qmd -->
  <p style="color: var(--fp-text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem;">
    Posts will appear here once published. See the <a href="blog.html">blog archive</a>.
  </p>
</div>
```

:::
